name: gamlepappa-hunstein-48c-dashboard
description: Gamlepappa Hunstein 48c Dashboard — sci-fi smart-home dashboard powered by Homey Pro

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
